prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GTX3582R Gen II for the 2.5L Turbo GDI engine (G4KL), supporting 400whp on E30 fuel with a custom BorgWarner 46.5mm wastegate and 1000cc ID injectors from Injector Dynamics

Full bolt-on forced induction kit for the G4KL, including a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping system from Vibrant Performance, paired with a CSF Racing 5507 radiator and a Koyorad 34-row front-mount intercooler

ECU reflash via K-Tuner V2.0 for the G4KL, optimizing ignition timing, fuel maps, and VVT for 93 octane with a flex-fuel sensor from Continental, paired with a custom 3-inch downpipe from MagnaFlow (catless for track use)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (K5-specific, 2021+ models) with custom carbon fiber fender flares and extended wheel arches to fit 19x10.5 ET25 front and 19x12 ET45 rear wheels from Work Emotion CR Kiwami
Full Rocket Bunny V2 aero kit (K5-specific), including front bumper lip, side skirts, and rear diffuser, all in raw carbon fiber with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap over the OEM paint
Custom rear wing from Seibon Carbon, modeled after the 992 GT3 RS ducktail, mounted on a custom aluminum pedestal with adjustable angle (0-15 degrees) and a 3D-printed ABS endplate for reduced drag
